full_text:
Wang Pu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Pu. Sent to confirm Sun Ce into his old ranks but was obliged by Sun Ce to make him a general. Wang Pu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
